title: Kelontae Gavin Live at City Winery
location: City Winery Atlanta, 987 Memorial Dr SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Gospel and R&B sensation Kelontae Gavin performs at City Winery. Intimate venue with wine, charcuterie, and great acoustics. Perfect for couples who love live music in a cozy, upscale setting. Arrive early for dinner and drinks before the show.

title: Vegan Soul Sunday – Hydration & Fresh Food
location: Atlanta (check Eventnoire for location)
description: Weekly vegan food gathering with plant-based dishes, fresh juices, and community vibes. Great low-key date idea for couples interested in healthy eating and connecting over good food. relaxed atmosphere, no pressure — just good vibes and great food.

title: Ichiko Aoba & Charlie Martin – Symphony Hall Atlanta
location: Symphony Hall Atlanta, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Japanese singer-songwriter Ichiko Aoba performs her ethereal, atmospheric folk music at Symphony Hall. A deeply romantic, cinematic experience — couples who appreciate atmospheric music and elegant venues will find this unforgettable.

title: Jazz On The Rooftop – Tuesdays at Virtue
location: Virtue Rooftop (above 5Church Midtown), 84 5th St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Weekly jazz night on one of Atlanta's most scenic rooftops. Perfect Tuesday evening date — start with dinner at 5Church below, then head up for jazz with skyline views. Great energy, saxophonist Loyd Watson Jr. performs. Weather-dependent, call ahead.

title: Scott Pilgrim vs. The World Drag Dinner
location: Lore Atlanta, Atlanta, GA
description: Epic drag show experience inspired by Scott Pilgrim. Dinner, drinks, and incredible performances — a super fun, memorable date night that's different from anything else. Great energy, hilarious hosts, and perfect for couples who love quirky entertainment.

title: ATL Bachatuesdays at Academy Ballroom
location: Academy Ballroom Atlanta, 6250 Lake Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's best weekly salsa and bachata social dance night. All skill levels welcome — beginners can grab a lesson early, then dance the night away. Great couples activity if you want to learn to move together. Energetic crowd, good DJs, and a fun late-night vibe.

title: The Classic Improv Show – Whole World Improv Theatre
location: Whole World Improv Theatre, 1231 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30306
description: Award-winning improv comedy show — actors create scenes on the spot based on audience suggestions. Fun, interactive, and different every time. Great for couples who enjoy spontaneous humor and want to support Atlanta's local arts scene.

title: The Classic Improv Show – Whole World Improv Theatre
location: Whole World Improv Theatre, 1231 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30306
description: Award-winning improv comedy show — actors create scenes on the spot based on audience suggestions. Fun, interactive, and different every time. Great for couples who enjoy spontaneous humor and want to support Atlanta's local arts scene.

title: Rickey Smiley – Special Event at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: TV personality and beloved comedian Rickey Smiley brings his stand-up to Atlanta. Helium is the city's top comedy club — intimate setting, great sightlines, solid food and drinks. Friday and Saturday shows. Call ahead for ticket availability.

title: Rickey Smiley – Special Event at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: TV personality and beloved comedian Rickey Smiley brings his stand-up to Atlanta. Helium is the city's top comedy club — intimate setting, great sightlines, solid food and drinks. Friday and Saturday shows. Call ahead for ticket availability.

title: 40th Annual Sweet Auburn Springfest
location: Auburn Avenue, Downtown Atlanta, GA
description: One of Atlanta's largest free outdoor festivals celebrating Black culture, music, food, and community. Live music, food vendors, art exhibits, and family-friendly activities. Great for couples who want a free, vibrant day out exploring Atlanta's historic Sweet Auburn district.

title: 40th Annual Sweet Auburn Springfest – Day 2
location: Auburn Avenue, Downtown Atlanta, GA
description: Second day of Atlanta's signature community festival. More live music, food, and cultural celebrations. Perfect for a full-day date — bring a blanket, grab food from vendors, and enjoy the vibes. One of the best free events in Atlanta.

title: Lila Iké Live at The Masquerade
location: The Masquerade (The Loft), 1374 West Peachtree St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Jamaican reggae star Lila Iké brings her captivating voice and modern reggae sound to The Loft. Intimate venue with great acoustics and cocktails — no arena crowds, just pure music in a cool space. Perfect for couples who love reggae and want a special night out.

title: Bruce Bruce Live at City Winery
location: City Winery Atlanta, 987 Memorial Dr SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Legendary comedian Bruce Bruce delivers his signature high-energy stand-up at City Winery. Wine, laughs, and an intimate date night atmosphere. Shows fill up fast — book early for the best seats. Great for couples who love comedy.

title: Atlanta's Soul Healing Picnic: Mother's Day Edition
location: Westside Park, Atlanta, GA
description: Outdoor picnic experience with soul food, live music, games, and community vibes. Great outdoor date idea — pack a blanket, enjoy the food vendors, and soak in the atmosphere. Especially festive for Mother's Day weekend.

title: Latin Fridays at Sanctuary Nightclub
location: Sanctuary Nightclub, 96 5th St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's premier Friday night Latin dance party. Salsa, bachata, merengue, reggaeton, and Latin pop on multiple floors. Full bar, great crowd, and always a good time. Perfect for couples who want to dance the night away.

title: Big Dog Improv Fest: Saturday Show
location: Red Light Cafe, 553 Amsterdam Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30306
description: Two-night improv comedy festival featuring Atlanta's best improv performers. Saturday night show at Red Light Cafe — intimate venue, great lineups, and lots of laughs. Perfect for couples who love comedy and want to discover rising talent.

title: Unbound Narratives: Embodied Language – Final Days
time: Exhibition runs through May 17; check website for hours
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 92 Georgia Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30312
description: Group exhibition exploring embodied language through diverse artistic expressions. Final weekend of this acclaimed show. Perfect cultural date — couples can wander through galleries together, grab coffee at the on-site café, and explore the surrounding area. Free admission.

title: ATL Bachatuesdays at Academy Ballroom
location: Academy Ballroom Atlanta, 6250 Lake Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's best weekly salsa and bachata social dance night. All skill levels welcome — beginners can grab a lesson early, then dance the night away. Great couples activity if you want to learn to move together. Energetic crowd, good DJs, and a fun late-night vibe.

title: ATL Bachatuesdays at Academy Ballroom
location: Academy Ballroom Atlanta, 6250 Lake Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's best weekly salsa and bachata social dance night. All skill levels welcome — beginners can grab a lesson early, then dance the night away. Great couples activity if you want to learn to move together. Energetic crowd, good DJs, and a fun late-night vibe.

title: Reggae Fest Massive ATL – Mavado, Busy Signal, Beenie Man & More
location: State Farm Arena, 1 State Farm Dr, Atlanta, GA 30303
description: Huge reggae festival featuring Mavado, Busy Signal, Beenie Man, Spice, Elephant Man, and more. State Farm Arena transforms into an island party with non-stop reggae vibes. Great for couples who love reggae and want to experience a big concert together. Food, drinks, and incredible energy.
